prompt: Create a LinkedIn post from this insight (chunking > embedding model, 28% RAGAS jump)

assertions.description: The skill triggered — either a raw insight card was created, or LinkedIn post variations were produced directly
Each LinkedIn post variation is under 3000 characters (LinkedIn text post limit)

The posts do not contain any of these banned patterns: 'Here's the thing', 'Let me break this down', 'Game-changer', 'Stop.', 'Read that again', 'I was today years old', 'Unpopular opinion', 'agree?', excessive hashtags, or one-word sentences used as hooks

The first 1-2 lines of each post create genuine curiosity through a surprising claim or counterintuitive framing — not through clickbait or vague teasing. The hook should be backed up by the content that follows
The posts sound like a practitioner sharing a real learning, not a thought leader performing expertise. Concrete details (28%, RAGAS, MiniLM) should appear; generic motivational language should not
